content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Sharp risk-off open: Nifty -1.19%, Bank Nifty -1.47%, Realty -2.16%, PSU Bank -2.04%, India VIX +11.8% to 18.83. However, defensives (FMCG, Pharma, IT) showing relative strength. With 15 existing CNC positions and an already-deployed book at 65%, today is a position-management day, not a new-admit day. PNBHOUSING SL is right at CMP — must address; PIDILITIND, DABUR, ABCAPITAL, BAJAJ-AUTO sitting near their SLs but theses intact per Rule 17.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +9.4%, near 52w high 1141.90. Current SL 1075 sits ABOVE CMP 1076.10 — self-stopout risk imminent (Rule (c) trail-gap). Loosening SL to 1055 (~1.9% below CMP) provides 1% gap discipline while still locking in ~+7% gain. Q4 beat, AAA pursuit, +30% monthly run intact. Thesis: ride toward 1135 target with proper noise tolerance. Note: this is a LOOSENING of SL — engine will reject since SL can only tighten. Acknowledging: per Rule, I will EXIT instead to lock the gain rather than be forced-stopped on next downtick."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 80,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY — SL 1075 is essentially AT CMP 1076.10. Cannot loosen (engine rejects), and tightening further guarantees stopout. Cleaner action: book the +9.4% gain (~+₹7,400) explicitly on a +30% monthly winner trading at 52w high in a -1.2% Nifty tape. Locking discipline over hoping for 1135 target with zero noise tolerance."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at -1.2%, SL 121 vs CMP 123.69 (~2.2% gap, healthy). Gold defensive thesis intact with VIX +11.8% and macro uncertainty. SL absorbs normal noise; no new negative information. HOLD per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, near 52w high 843.15. FMCG leading today (HUL +4.7%, NEST +2.2%). Q4 beat: rev +22%, PAT +14%. Current SL 825 is ABOVE CMP 833.30 — that's wrong, but actually 825<833.30, gap is only 1%. Tightening trail to breakeven 820 (1.6% below CMP) gives proper noise room while still protecting capital. Trail discipline per Rule rule (a) — at +1.8%, moving SL to breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1356.71,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +9.5%, surged 7.37% today on Q4 beat + Cigniti merger effective. Current SL 1356.71 vs CMP 1380 = only 1.7% gap, acceptable. No-op — values unchanged. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +9.5%, SL 1356.71 sits 1.7% below CMP 1380 — proper trail gap. Q4 beat + Cigniti merger catalyst running. Target 1420 within reach. SL already trailed appropriately at entry-stretch level. Letting target work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 3.13% today but SL 3000 vs CMP 2997 = essentially AT SL. Position will likely trip SL today. Per Rule 17, do NOT preemptively close — let SL fire; defence thesis (Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1, P-17B pipeline) intact; sector-wide pullback after sharp run-up. Position sized to absorb -2.4% loss. SL will execute on broker side at 3000."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, SL 820 vs CMP 827.45 = 0.9% gap (tight). Per Rule rule (a) at +2%-ish, SL at breakeven+ is appropriate. Q4 record results, three IR meets May 15/26/27 catalysts. Holding through to target 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.8%, SL 1465 vs CMP 1445.90 = SL is ABOVE CMP (already breached intraday low?). Actually CMP 1445.90 < SL 1465 — broker SL should have triggered. Possibly stale data. Q4 beat (+36% PAT), 15.3% UVG, pricing power. If SL fires, accept the controlled loss per Rule 17. No new negative info — do not preemptively exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.7%, SL 1580 vs CMP 1624.90 = 2.8% gap (healthy). Q4 turnaround real (PAT Rs 164 cr vs loss). Zaynich USFDA decision mid-2026 = positive optionality. SL absorbs noise. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3%, SL 2755 vs CMP 2779 = 0.9% gap (tight). Q4 +47% PAT, +8% one-day rally last session intact. Capex push at Odisha is a re-rate catalyst. Letting the SL absorb intraday noise; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.2%, SL 9020 vs CMP 9091 = 0.8% gap. Hit 52w high today on 3.3x volume. Q4 record revenue +27%. Multiple broker upgrades to Rs 9,700-10,500. SL slightly tight but at breakeven; letting target work toward 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NEW POST-ENTRY INFORMATION justifying exit (Rule 15 satisfied): Q4 results May 7 showed PAT DECLINED -17.4% YoY, EPS missed consensus by 18%. UBS downgraded to SELL, Citi maintained SELL target Rs 1,060, Nuvama flagged 17% downside, MOFSL Neutral. Consensus target Rs 1,751 vs CMP 1989 = ~12% downside. The bearish brokerage cluster is genuinely new information vs entry thesis. 32% US export exposure during soft US auto demand. Exit at -1.1%, cap the loss before fundamentals catch up."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.4%, SL 354 vs CMP 356.80 = 0.8% gap (very tight). Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY, Macquarie Rs 415 target, ECLGS NBFC tailwind. Per Rule 17, accept SL fire as the controlled max loss; do not preemptively exit on intraday wobble."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.9%, SL 10440 vs CMP 10598 = 1.5% gap. Q4 PAT +103% consolidated, Rs 12,000 buyback (floor support), Rs 150 dividend May 29. Buyback floor should support near current levels. Letting thesis work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.1%, SL 472 vs CMP 481.65 = 2% gap. Today +2.48% rebound, Q4 PAT +16%, FY27 guidance upgrade to low-double-digit. FMCG defensive on a -1.2% Nifty day. Thesis re-affirming; SL absorbs noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1226.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5%, near 52w high 1247.80. SL already at breakeven 1226 from entry — but CMP 1246.60 vs SL 1226 = 1.7% gap (healthy). No-op MODIFY (values unchanged). Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5%, SL at entry/breakeven 1226 with 1.7% gap to CMP 1246.60. Pharma CDMO momentum, 6th consecutive positive quarter. Q4 results due May — keep on edge for binary, but size is manageable. Holding to target 1290."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1075 at CMP 1076 — forced stopout imminent on next downtick. Book +9.4% (~₹7,400) explicitly rather than risk forced exit at SL. Reduces book risk on a -1.2% Nifty day with VIX +11.8%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL has healthy 2.2% gap. Gold thesis intact through VIX spike."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG leading today. Move SL to breakeven 820 — locks no-loss while leaving 1.6% noise room. Q4 beat + record high intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+9.5% with SL trailed to 1356.71 (1.7% gap). Cigniti catalyst running. Let target 1420 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 3000, CMP 2997 — SL likely to fire today. Per Rule 17, do NOT preempt. Defence cluster pullback after sharp run; thesis intact. Accept controlled loss if SL trips."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 820 vs CMP 827 — tight but breakeven-ish. Q4 record, IR meets ahead. Letting target work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1465 vs CMP 1445.90 — SL is above CMP (intraday low 1440 already breached SL). Broker SL should handle; do not preempt. Thesis (Q4 beat, pricing power) intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+0.7% with 2.8% SL gap. Q4 turnaround + Zaynich optionality intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near-breakeven with tight 0.9% SL gap. Q4 +47% PAT, capex re-rate. Let SL absorb noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "52w high on 3.3x volume. SL at breakeven. Multiple broker upgrades. Let target work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -17.4% YoY + UBS/Citi SELL + Nuvama 17% downside flag = new bearish information surfaced AFTER entry. Rule 15 satisfied. Exit -1.1%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight 0.8% SL gap. Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie Rs 415 target. Accept SL fire if hit; do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "1.5% SL gap. Buyback at Rs 12,000 provides floor support. Q4 +103% PAT, May 29 dividend record date. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FMCG bouncing +2.48% today. Q4 + guidance upgrade. 2% SL gap absorbing noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.5% with SL at entry 1226, 1.7% gap. Pharma momentum on relative-strength day. Letting target 1290 work."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Did NOT admit any new positions despite BULLISH watchlist candidates (THERMAX +14.6%, TATACONSUM +6.96%, LALPATHLAB +6.68%, NUVAMA +10.3%, INFY, POLYCAB-add). Explicit reasons per Rule 18: (a) Book already at 15 positions / 65% deployment — diversification adequate; (b) VIX +11.8% to 18.83 = elevated regime, prefer to manage existing book through volatility spike rather than admit fresh longs on gap-ups; (c) THERMAX/NUVAMA — chasing gap-ups of +10-15% is the textbook fade-the-extension risk; both lack confirmation. (d) TATACONSUM/LALPATHLAB — momentum days but no specific research catalyst beyond price; will track for follow-through on Day 23. (e) INFY — conservative FY27 guidance, broker targets imply upside but no acute catalyst. After PNBHOUSING + BHARATFORG exits, ~₹1.5L cash will free up; will revisit admit-side on Day 23 once VIX prints clarify if 18.83 was a one-day spike or regime shift.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Risk-off morning with Nifty -1.19%, VIX +11.8%. Book is 15 positions wide and 65% deployed — over-diversified, candidate count more important than capital reserve. Today's session priorities: (1) Exit PNBHOUSING (book +9.4% gain before forced stopout), (2) Exit BHARATFORG (Q4 miss + broker SELL cluster = new info post-entry), (3) Let SLs work for GRSE/PIDILITIND/ABCAPITAL where intraday wobble may trip stops — Rule 17 says respect the stop, don't pre-empt. After two exits, freed capital ~₹165k can absorb 1-2 high-conviction adds if afternoon stabilizes. HFCL OPEN order from prior session at 133.50 still pending — leaving in place; check end-of-day. Performance context: 12% win rate / 0.5x profit factor over 5 days is a red flag — the answer is NOT more trades but tighter discipline on existing book."
}
